message:
Update changelog release command in documentation

Replace deprecated 'release show' with 'release notes' in the release
workflow guide to match the current tenzir-changelog API.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+---
+title: Fix release command documentation
+type: bugfix
+authors:
+  - Matthias Vallentin
+components:
+  - changelog
+created: 2025-12-09T16:08:11.000000Z
+---
+
+Updated the /changelog:release command documentation to use `release notes` instead of the deprecated `release show` command, matching the current tenzir-changelog API.

@@ -66,7 +66,7 @@ uvx tenzir-changelog release create vX.Y.Z --intro-file /tmp/intro.md --yes
 Display the generated release notes and use `AskUserQuestion` to ask for confirmation:
 
 ```sh
-uvx tenzir-changelog release show vX.Y.Z
+uvx tenzir-changelog release notes vX.Y.Z
 ```
 
 If adjustments are needed, edit the intro or entries and re-run `release create`.
